topics_searched: KV cache K/V functional roles and perturbation
KV cache compression and phase transitions
Hidden channels and steganography in LLMs

key_finding: K > V independently confirmed by quantization literature (AsymKV: V can be 1-bit). Reasoning Horizon at 70-85% maps to our positional dissociation. 'Where Matters More Than What' confirms position > content. Steganographic capabilities nascent but growing in frontier LLMs.
evidence_impact: Literature convergence upgraded to DECISIVE (8+ angles, 45+ papers). Two new independent confirmations added to evidence table (rows 22-23).
next_planned: Potential: (1) Test K/V perturbation at Reasoning Horizon (70-85% chain position), (2) Write-up/technical report, (3) AsymKV-informed layer-wise precision experiments

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed.

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG. Late=answer (59x ratio), early=infrastructure. Now independently confirmed by 'Where > What' (Tian 2026).

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL (5/5 models). Now independently confirmed by AsymKV quantization (COLING 2025).

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 training variants, GQA + MHA, Base + Instruct.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 8+ independent angles, 45+ papers across 4 scans. K > V and position > content independently confirmed.
